features: Glass Steamroller Pipe - 10 cm Long Tube with 10 mm circumference - Clear Glass is really thick sand blasted with Euphoric Look
Steamroller hits like a Mini Beast Monster - Sledgehammer - Cannon - Bazooka. Unbelievably Smooth with a hard hits
Lungbuster is easy to use - No attachment required - Wide Stem - Love it after work relaxing - On Travel
New Cup Bowl 15 mm accommodates real pack of tobacco - concentrate that will last a while

Shotgun pipe is a portable way to enjoy a glass piece without the use of water. The pipe is the perfect size to fit in your pocket and is easy to use, so if you are looking for a great performing portable glass pipe to enjoy on your own or with friends, then this pipe is a the perfect choice
description: Product Description DRAW & RELEASE ACTION The IBEST Steamroller pipe consists of a hollow tube open at both ends, and a bowl on one side near one end. You cover the end nearest the bowl with your hand while inhaling the smoke into the tube. Simply release your hand from the end to release the vacuum and inhale the smoke. ROLL STOPPER The roll stoppers under the bowl prevent the pipe from falling over or stand it on when it's not being used and the sand blasted glass body allows you to see the pipe fill up with smoke and that's when you remove your hand from the end and inhale for a big, clean hit! REAL KICK HIT Steamroller pipes are renowned for the potent, gnarly hit they offer. This isn't the smooth hit from your water bong, this is a piece for those who like to feel their hit as well as taste it. Steamroller pipes are for a select group of herb fans, to find out if that means you; you'll have to try it out. DRY HERB PIPE Dry herb pipes are portable, discreet, fast to pack, and easy to use. This makes them perfect for herb fans who enjoy speed and portability when it comes to their smoking experience. BOROSILICATE GLASS IBEST Glass use only high-grade borosilicate glass for their steamroller pipes and are subject to continuous quality and performance tests. The best bongs in the herb scene are made of high-quality Borosilicate glass. This premium type of glass is much more heat resistant than other forms of glass. This makes it much less likely to fracture when in use. The process of its creation involves the addition of the chemical Boron which reduces the material stresses caused by temperature gradients. Steamroller Glass Pipe with Round Ball Approximately glass pipe length is 10 cm (from mouthpiece end to the other end of tube. Tube is approximately 10 mm round. Steamroller glass pipe has logo - IBEST Smoking Pipes Bowl, Ball and Feet Tube has top Bowl and its approx. height 15mm and 18mm round from top view. Tube has two feet for stability. Random colour feet will be supplied. Steamroller Top View Oil glass pipe has two feet (random colour) for stability on all type of surfaces. Discrete Packing Steamroller pipe will be supplied in padded bubble envelop. It can't be seen through inside. We have a huge variety of high-quality dry herb pipes. You can select from the glass bong, E-Cigarette, Lighters, Smoking Pipes, Tobacco Grinders, Ashtrays, hand pipes or other innovative pipes in a variety of materials like borosilicate glass, metal, wood, aluminum and much more! Our top quality glass smoking pipes ensure to satisfy our customers. We also offer a wide variety of beautifully wrapped and boxed pipes that are ideal gifts for any type of occasion. With the product match, we ensure you to pay the best possible value. We sell a great selection of glass smoking pipes in UK, Scotland. If you are fond of smoking and want to get the best pipes which suits your personality, we are here to provide you with a wide range of our beautiful handmade smoking pipes. You can easily pick your favorite pipe.
